name: Kreplach with Several Fillings
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the noodle dough by mixing salt with eggs, then adding eggs to flour and combining until a stiff dough forms. Knead until smooth and elastic.
2. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured board or cloth until very thin. Cut into 3-inch squares.
3. Fill each square with one tablespoon of your chosen filling (see below) in the center, then fold to form a triangle and crimp edges with a fork.
Fillings:
- Chicken Filling: Cooked, minced chicken; onion; egg; salt and pepper
- Chicken Liver Filling: Broiled chicken livers; hard boiled eggs; small onion; salt and pepper; 1 tablespoon schmalz (chicken fat)
- Meat Filling: Cooked, ground meat; egg; onion; salt and pepper
- Cheese Filling: Cottage cheese; bread crumbs; egg; onion; salt and pepper
Cook the noodles in boiling water until they float to the top (about 10-12 minutes). Do not cook them in soup. Serve chicken noodle kreplach with soup, and serve cheese kreplach on the side with sour cream. Each recipe makes about 30 pieces, or at least 3 of each type.
